proposed_hypotheses.text: For patients in `ds001_breast`, each one-unit increase in continuous `feature_044` is associated with higher mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted OLS estimated +0.1759 months of PFS per one-unit increase in `feature_044` (z=220.12, p under numerical precision).

analyses.code: OLS with all features standardized as covariates
analyses.result_summary: After adjustment for all other features, the association remained +0.1757 months per one-unit increase in `feature_044` (z=343.32, p under numerical precision).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ordinal values of `feature_027` are associated with lower mean `pfs_months`, with patients at value 2 having the shortest PFS.

analyses.code: Group means and OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_027
analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS declined monotonically across `feature_027`: value 0 mean 5.640 months (n=17592), value 1 mean 4.444 months (n=24971), value 2 mean 3.289 months (n=7437). Linear unadjusted effect was -1.180 months per category (z=-75.64).

analyses.code: OLS with all features standardized as covariates
analyses.result_summary: The all-feature adjusted effect was -1.172 months per one-category increase in `feature_027` (z=-155.90, p under numerical precision).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with binary `feature_039` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_039` equal to 0.

analyses.code: Mean difference and OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_039
analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS was 3.617 months for `feature_039`=1 (n=14969) versus 5.153 months for `feature_039`=0 (n=35031), an unadjusted difference of -1.536 months.

analyses.code: OLS with all features standardized as covariates
analyses.result_summary: After all-feature adjustment, `feature_039`=1 remained associated with -1.549 months of PFS (z=-139.31, p under numerical precision).

analyses.result_summary: After all-feature adjustment, `feature_046`=1 remained associated with +1.101 months of PFS (z=103.03, p under numerical precision).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `feature_046` equal to 1 with `pfs_months` is attenuated when binary `feature_031` is also 1; the `feature_046` by `feature_031` interaction is negative.

analyses.result_summary: The all-main-effect adjusted interaction coefficient for `feature_046`*`feature_031` was -1.665 months (z=-78.63, p under numerical precision). Cell means showed the high-PFS group was `feature_046`=1/`feature_031`=0 at 5.966 months, while `feature_046`=1/`feature_031`=1 averaged 4.352 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `feature_046` equal to 1 with `pfs_months` is stronger when binary `feature_069` is also 1; the `feature_046` by `feature_069` interaction is positive.

analyses.result_summary: The all-main-effect adjusted interaction coefficient for `feature_046`*`feature_069` was +1.559 months (z=70.16, p under numerical precision). Cell means were 5.890 months for both features equal to 1 versus about 4.30 months in the other cells.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `feature_046` equal to 1 with `pfs_months` is attenuated when binary `feature_063` is also 1; the `feature_046` by `feature_063` interaction is negative.

analyses.result_summary: The all-main-effect adjusted interaction coefficient for `feature_046`*`feature_063` was -1.339 months (z=-49.58, p under numerical precision). Cell means showed `feature_046`=1/`feature_063`=0 averaged 5.657 months, while `feature_046`=1/`feature_063`=1 averaged 4.308 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative slope of continuous `feature_062` on `pfs_months` is stronger in the subgroup with binary `feature_046` equal to 1 than in the subgroup with `feature_046` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: The all-main-effect adjusted `feature_062`*`feature_046` interaction was -0.0531 months per `feature_062` unit (z=-63.07, p under numerical precision). Stratified unadjusted slopes were -0.0004 when `feature_046`=0 and -0.0528 when `feature_046`=1.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative slope of continuous `feature_062` on `pfs_months` is weaker when binary `feature_031` is 1 than when `feature_031` is 0; the interaction is positive.
The negative slope of continuous `feature_062` on `pfs_months` is stronger when binary `feature_069` is 1 than when `feature_069` is 0; the interaction is negative.
The negative slope of continuous `feature_062` on `pfs_months` is weaker when binary `feature_063` is 1 than when `feature_063` is 0; the interaction is positive.

analyses.result_summary: The adjusted interaction `feature_062`*`feature_031` was +0.0294 months per unit (z=34.18, p under numerical precision). Stratified slopes were -0.0295 for `feature_031`=0 and +0.0003 for `feature_031`=1.

The adjusted interaction `feature_062`*`feature_069` was -0.0263 months per unit (z=-29.03, p under numerical precision). Stratified slopes were -0.0009 for `feature_069`=0 and -0.0263 for `feature_069`=1.

The adjusted interaction `feature_062`*`feature_063` was +0.0222 months per unit (z=20.30, p under numerical precision). Stratified slopes were -0.0226 for `feature_063`=0 and -0.0015 for `feature_063`=1.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Binary `feature_031` and binary `feature_069` have a negative interaction for `pfs_months`, so their joint presence is lower than expected from their main effects.
Binary `feature_031` and binary `feature_063` have a positive interaction for `pfs_months`, so their joint presence is higher than expected from their main effects.
Binary `feature_069` and binary `feature_063` have a negative interaction for `pfs_months`, so their joint presence is lower than expected from their main effects.

analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_031`*`feature_069` interaction was -0.826 months (z=-35.93, p under numerical precision).
The adjusted `feature_031`*`feature_063` interaction was +0.718 months (z=26.10, p under numerical precision).
The adjusted `feature_069`*`feature_063` interaction was -0.649 months (z=-22.70, p under numerical precision).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive slope of continuous `feature_044` on `pfs_months` is weaker when binary `feature_039` equals 1; the `feature_044` by `feature_039` interaction is negative.
The positive slope of continuous `feature_044` on `pfs_months` is weaker at higher values of ordinal `feature_027`; the `feature_044` by `feature_027` interaction is negative.
The positive slope of continuous `feature_044` on `pfs_months` is stronger at higher values of continuous `feature_004`; the `feature_044` by `feature_004` interaction is positive.
The positive slope of continuous `feature_044` on `pfs_months` is weaker when binary `feature_015` equals 1; the `feature_044` by `feature_015` interaction is negative.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted `feature_044`*`feature_039` interaction was -0.0106 months per `feature_044` unit (z=-9.51, p under numerical precision).
Adjusted `feature_044`*`feature_027` interaction was -0.00626 months per `feature_044` unit per `feature_027` category (z=-8.33, p=1.11e-16).
Adjusted `feature_044`*`feature_004` interaction was +0.00343 months per product unit (z=3.36, p=0.00077).
Adjusted `feature_044`*`feature_015` interaction was -0.00630 months per `feature_044` unit (z=-3.72, p=0.00020).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The exploratory unadjusted negative interaction between ordinal `feature_027` and continuous `feature_033` persists after adjustment for all main features.
The exploratory unadjusted positive interaction between binary `feature_015` and continuous `feature_037` persists after adjustment for all main features.

analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_027`*`feature_033` interaction was -0.000119 months per product unit and was not significant (z=-1.29, p=0.198).
The adjusted `feature_015`*`feature_037` interaction reversed to -0.00371 months per product unit and was not significant (z=-0.85, p=0.397).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between continuous `feature_044` and `pfs_months` is nonlinear, with a positive quadratic component after adjustment for all main effects.
The association between continuous `feature_062` and `pfs_months` is nonlinear, with a positive quadratic component after adjustment for all main effects.
The associations between continuous `feature_037` and `pfs_months` and between continuous `feature_004` and `pfs_months` have no detectable adjusted quadratic component.

analyses.result_summary: The adjusted quadratic term for `feature_044` was +0.0605 months per squared SD (z=16.32, p under numerical precision), supporting mild upward curvature.
The adjusted quadratic term for `feature_062` was +0.0618 months per squared SD (z=28.11, p under numerical precision), indicating curvature despite the negative linear component.
Quadratic terms were not significant for `feature_037` (-0.00484, p=0.259) or `feature_004` (-0.00412, p=0.254), so their adjusted effects were adequately summarized as linear in this screen.
